case_catalog.description: Ideal block-diagonal SQR on a cavity-diagonal input with qubit g.
Ideal block-diagonal SQR on a cavity-diagonal input with qubit e.
Ideal block-diagonal SQR on a cavity-diagonal input with qubit +.
Ideal block-diagonal SQR on a cavity-diagonal input with qubit +y.
Ideal block-diagonal SQR on a cavity superposition; same sector marginals as the diagonal benchmark but with cavity coherences.
CPSQR-like conditional phase gate on a cavity-diagonal input with qubit |+>.
Optimized multitone black-box SQR on a cavity mixture with qubit g.
Optimized multitone black-box SQR on a cavity mixture with qubit +.
Optimized multitone black-box SQR on a cavity superposition with qubit |g>.
Short, unoptimized multitone seed waveform on a cavity superposition with qubit |g>.
Optimized multitone waveform replayed on a three-level transmon model to expose leakage sensitivity.

recommendation_lines: Use wait-only when the goal is the cleanest recovery of the weighted transverse sector data.
Add displacement-plus-wait when you need a diagnostic for cavity coherences or model mismatch.
Do not claim recovery of p_n or sector-resolved Z_n without an extra cavity-sensitive measurement primitive.
